---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new compliance check, article coverage, or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the compliance gap or use case.

## Proposed solution

How you think it should work. If suggesting a new article check, include:
- EU AI Act article and section number
- What the check should detect
- Example code that would pass/fail the check

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered.
